cedict_en: text/CL:篇[pian1]
person in charge

must_distinguish.note: 负责人 = the person in charge (noun, a role); 负责 = to be responsible for / to take charge of (verb/adjective)

cedict_en: to defeat/to damage/to lose (to an opponent)/to fail/to wither

must_distinguish.note: 败 = be defeated (war, competition — formal/literary); 失败 = fail/suffer defeat (general: project, attempt, battle); 输 = lose a contest/game (colloquial, zero-sum, also 'input').

cedict_en: goods/money/commodity/CL:個|个[ge4]

must_distinguish.note: 货 = goods/cargo (general, incl. freight); 百货 = general merchandise (retail variety); 商品 = commodity (market economics term); 产品 = product (manufactured output); 物资 = supplies/materials (logistics, often strategic)
货 = physical goods in transit/trade (cargo emphasis); 商品 = commodity as market item; 产品 = manufactured product; 物资 = supplies/material resources (logistics/state context)

cedict_en: greeting card/congratulation card

must_distinguish.note: 贺卡 = greeting/congratulations card (holidays, birthdays); 请帖 = invitation card (traditional style); 请柬 = formal invitation card (official/written); 名片 = business card (professional identity)

cedict_en: to bestow (a reward)/to give (to an inferior)/to hand down/a reward (bestowed by a superior)/to appreciate (beauty)

must_distinguish.note: 欣赏 = appreciate beauty/art/performance (enjoyment); 赏 = admire scenery OR reward/bestow (classical, dual sense); 佩服 = admire someone's skill or character (colloquial respect)

cedict_en: to compensate for loss/to indemnify/to suffer a financial loss

must_distinguish.note: 赔 = to compensate someone for a loss or sell at a loss; 损失 (5k) = loss/damage (the noun); 亏损 (5k) = financial deficit (business accounting); 吃亏 (5k) = to come out worse off, be at a disadvantage (colloquial)

cedict_en: to admire/to praise/to appreciate

must_distinguish.note: 赞赏 = admire and praise (both feeling + verbal expression); 欣赏 = enjoy/appreciate aesthetically (art, scenery, talent — internal pleasure); 佩服 = admire someone's skill or character (colloquial, often heartfelt); 羡慕 = envy/admire what someone has (desire to have it yourself).

赞赏 = admire and praise (sincere, can be peer-to-peer); 表扬 = official/public praise (from above, institutional); 夸 = casual verbal praise, also 'exaggerate' (colloquial); 吹捧 = lavish over-the-top praise, flattery (often insincere/sycophantic).

赞赏 = admire + praise (mixed feeling+speech); 欣赏 = appreciate/enjoy aesthetically (no envy, no praise); 佩服 = respect/admire someone's skill (colloquial, internal); 羡慕 = envy/admire (wanting what they have); 表扬 = official praise from above; 夸 = casually praise or exaggerate; 吹捧 = lavish/excessive flattery (pejorative).

cedict_en: to win/to gain

must_distinguish.note: 中奖 = win a lottery/prize draw (chance); 获奖 = receive a formal award/prize (achievement); 赢得 = win/gain something through effort (takes an object: trust, title); 赢 = simply win a contest/game; 胜 = beat an opponent (verb, also adj 'superior'); 胜利 = victory (noun, often military/political)

cedict_en: to leave; to walk away; to beat it/to move aside

must_distinguish.note: 走开 = go away / move aside (imperative, abrupt, short-range); 离开 = leave/depart (neutral, from a place or person, any distance)

cedict_en: to walk past/to pass by

must_distinguish.note: 走过 = walk past (simple motion past a point); 经过 = pass through / by (also means 'the process of', broader); 穿越 = pass through / traverse (crossing through a space, also time-travel fiction)

cedict_en: to overtake; to catch up with/to hurry; to rush/to try to catch (the bus etc)/to drive (cattle etc) forward; to drive (sb) away/to avail oneself of (an opportunity)/until; by (a certain time)
dataset_meanings: to overtake; to catch up with
to try to catch (the bus etc)
to drive (cattle etc) forward; to drive (sb) away

must_distinguish.note: 赶 = hurry/catch (general verb); 赶到 = arrive by hurrying (resultative); 赶快 = imperative adverb 'hurry up!'; 赶紧 = hurry (self-motivated, softer than 赶快); 催 = to rush someone else; 匆忙 = in a rush (manner adjective/adverb).

cedict_en: to hurry (to some place)

must_distinguish.note: 赶 = hurry/catch (general verb); 赶到 = arrive by hurrying (resultative); 赶快 = imperative adverb 'hurry up!'; 赶紧 = hurry (self-motivated, softer than 赶快); 催 = to rush someone else; 匆忙 = in a rush (manner adjective/adverb).

meaning_en: to play a role; have effect
cedict_en: (in an expression of the form 起到[qi3 dao4] + … + 作用[zuo4 yong4]) to have (a (motivating etc) effect); to play (a (stabilizing etc) role)
dataset_meanings: (in an expression of the form 起到…用) to have (a (motivating etc) effect); to play (a (stabilizing etc) role)

cedict_en: (a person's) height

must_distinguish.note: 身高 = measured height (formal, e.g. medical records); 个子 = colloquial stature (general spoken); 个儿 = colloquial stature (northern/Beijing dialect variant)

cedict_en: rail station/bus stop/CL:處|处[chu4],個|个[ge4]

must_distinguish.note: 车站 = general term for a bus or train station; 地铁站 = specifically a subway/metro station. 地铁站 is a subset of 车站 but learners confuse them when describing urban transit stops.

cedict_en: to turn sth around/to swivel/to rotate (about an axis)/to revolve/to turn/to move in a circle/to gyrate

must_distinguish.note: 转动 = rotate/spin on an axis; 围绕 = revolve around a center, or center a topic on; 绕 = wind around, detour, wrap

cedict_en: to change; to turn; to convert/(genetics) to transform/(chemistry) isomerization

must_distinguish.note: 转换 = switch between modes/channels (technical, reversible); 转化 = convert/transform substance or nature into sth new; 转变 = shift direction or stance (abstract, purposeful); 改造 = physically remodel or restructure; 改变 = intentionally change (broad, everyday)

cedict_en: to change direction/fig. to change one's stance/to get lost/to lose one's way

must_distinguish.note: 转向 = change direction / pivot (vehicle, policy, broad turn); 回头 = turn one's head back / return; also colloquial 'later'; 拐弯 = turn a corner (physical, road/path)

cedict_en: to change/to switch/to convert/to transform

must_distinguish.note: 转换 = switch between modes/channels (technical, reversible); 转化 = convert/transform substance or nature into sth new; 转变 = shift direction or stance (abstract, purposeful); 改造 = physically remodel or restructure; 改变 = intentionally change (broad, everyday)

cedict_en: wheel; disk; ring/steamship/to take turns; to rotate/classifier for big round objects: disk, or recurring events: round, turn
dataset_meanings: classifier for big round objects: disk, or recurring events: round, turn

cedict_en: dictionary (variant of 詞典|词典[ci2 dian3])/CL:本[ben3],部[bu4]

must_distinguish.note: 辞典 = dictionary of words and phrases; 字典 = dictionary of individual characters (by stroke/radical)

cedict_en: to celebrate the Chinese New Year
dataset_meanings: to celebrate the Chinese New Year

cedict_en: near in time/in the near future/very soon/recent

must_distinguish.note: 目前 = at present, the current moment (point in time); 近期 = the near term, a span of time close to now (can be past or future).

cedict_en: to return to/to come (or go) back

must_distinguish.note: 返回 = go/travel back (neutral direction); 回来 = come back toward speaker; 归 = return to one's place/origin (literary) or belong to; 归还 = give back a borrowed object

cedict_en: at this time/at this moment

must_distinguish.note: 这时 = written/narrative 'at this point'; 这时候 = colloquial spoken equivalent; interchangeable in meaning, differ in register
这时 = written/narrative 'at this point'; 这时候 = colloquial spoken equivalent; interchangeable in meaning, differ in register

cedict_en: this side/here

must_distinguish.note: 这里 = 'here / this place' (neutral location); 这边 = 'this side / this way' (directional, often contrasted with 那边; also used to gesture someone over).

cedict_en: to go forward/to advance/to go in/to enter/to put in/to submit/to take in/to admit/(math.) base of a number system/classifier for sections in a building or residential compound
dataset_meanings: classifier for sections in a building or residential compound

must_distinguish.note: All involve movement toward the speaker. 进 = enter (neutral). 进来 = come in (into enclosed space, toward speaker). 上来 = come up (upward toward speaker). 传来 = reach the speaker (sound/news only, not physical). 回来 = come back (returning).

cedict_en: to go in

must_distinguish.note: 进去 = go in / enter (directional complement, spoken, toward speaker's perspective); 进入 = enter/go into (formal verb, used in writing and fixed phrases)

cedict_en: to come in

must_distinguish.note: All involve movement toward the speaker. 进 = enter (neutral). 进来 = come in (into enclosed space, toward speaker). 上来 = come up (upward toward speaker). 传来 = reach the speaker (sound/news only, not physical). 回来 = come back (returning).

cedict_en: distant place

must_distinguish.note: 远处 = location noun (the distant place/afar); 遥远 = adjective describing something as remote/far-off

cedict_en: to violate the rules

must_distinguish.note: 违规 = break a rule/regulation (procedural, administrative); 违反 = violate a law, rule, or principle (broader, incl. laws); 侵犯 = infringe/encroach (rights, territory — implies harming another).

cedict_en: to link; to join; to connect
dataset_meanings: to link; to join; to connect

must_distinguish.note: 连接 = connect/link (general, physical or abstract); 衔接 = link up smoothly (join segments without gap); 链接 = hyperlink (tech/internet context).

meaning_en: late; slow (≠ 迟到 arrive late)
cedict_en: surname Chi/late/delayed/slow

must_distinguish.note: Both involve lateness; 迟 is an adjective/adverb ('late; slow') used attributively or in compounds, 迟到 is a resultative verb meaning 'to arrive late' and takes a subject.

cedict_en: to withdraw/to abort/to quit/to log out (computing)

must_distinguish.note: 退出 = exit a place/app/organization; 戒 = quit a habit (smoking, drinking) by self-discipline; 撤退 = military/tactical withdrawal; 退 = back up or return something
送到 = physically deliver to a destination; 捎 = deliver/bring along en passant; 转达 = relay a verbal or written message via a third party

meaning_en: give as a gift; hand to s.o.
cedict_en: to send/to give as a present

must_distinguish.note: 送给 = give as a gift or hand something to someone; 发送 = transmit/send digitally or officially (messages, signals)

cedict_en: to escape/to flee/to run away

must_distinguish.note: 逃 = base verb (flee/escape); 逃跑 = flee by running (emphasises running motion); 逃走 = escape and leave (directional completion, not necessarily running)

cedict_en: to flee from sth/to run away/to escape

must_distinguish.note: 逃 = base verb (flee/escape); 逃跑 = flee by running (emphasises running motion); 逃走 = escape and leave (directional completion, not necessarily running)

cedict_en: (at a school) to take as an elective/an elective/elective (subject)
dataset_meanings: (at a school) to take as an elective

cedict_en: to hand it (i.e. the aforementioned item) to (sb)
dataset_meanings: to hand it (i.e. the aforementioned item) to (sb)

must_distinguish.note: 递给 = pass to (physical hand-to-hand, no ownership transfer); 交给 = hand over (transfer responsibility, duty, or ownership)

cedict_en: to correspond (by letter, email etc)/to send or receive messages through telecommunications
to make/to build/to manufacture/to invent/to fabricate/to go to/party (in a lawsuit or legal agreement)/crop/classifier for crops
dataset_meanings: party (in a lawsuit or legal agreement)

must_distinguish.note: 造 = make/build/create (general, broad); 制成 = manufacture into a finished product (stresses the end result of production).

cedict_en: surname Yu/(bound form) to encounter; to happen upon; to meet unplanned/(bound form) to treat; to receive

must_distinguish.note: 遇 = encounter (root, often unplanned); 遇见 = run into (colloquial, neutral); 碰见 = bump into (casual, chance); 逢 = meet/on the occasion of (literary/set phrases); 会晤 = meet formally (diplomatic/official).
遇见 = colloquial chance meeting (person); 遇 = literary/compound base (encounter, also adversity); 逢 = literary every-time-occasion sense; 遭到 = meet with something bad only

cedict_en: to meet

must_distinguish.note: 遇 = encounter (root, often unplanned); 遇见 = run into (colloquial, neutral); 碰见 = bump into (casual, chance); 逢 = meet/on the occasion of (literary/set phrases); 会晤 = meet formally (diplomatic/official).
遇见 = colloquial chance meeting (person); 遇 = literary/compound base (encounter, also adversity); 逢 = literary every-time-occasion sense; 遭到 = meet with something bad only
接 = go to meet/receive (arranged, pick up); 见 = see/meet (perception-based); 遇见 = chance run-in; 会晤 = formal talks between officials

cedict_en: to avoid/to shun/to flee/to escape/to keep away from/to leave/to hide from

must_distinguish.note: 避 = avoid/evade (deliberate effort to stay away from sth); 逃 = flee/escape (physical movement away from danger).

cedict_en: at that time (in the past or the future)/also pr. [nei4 hui4 r5]
dataset_meanings: at that time (in the past or the future)

must_distinguish.note: 那会儿 = colloquial Beijing er-hua; 那时候 = neutral spoken; both mean 'at that time' but register differs

cedict_en: then/at that time/in those days

must_distinguish.note: 那时 = 'at that time' (anaphoric: refers back to a time just mentioned); 当年 = 'back in those years / in that era' (nostalgic retrospect, specific period); 昔日 = 'in former days' (literary/elevated register, often lyrical).

cedict_en: at that time

must_distinguish.note: 那会儿 = colloquial Beijing er-hua; 那时候 = neutral spoken; both mean 'at that time' but register differs

cedict_en: over there/yonder

must_distinguish.note: Both mean 'over there': 那里 = neutral 'that place/there'; 那边 = 'that side/direction over there' (emphasises spatial direction or side rather than just location)

cedict_en: (lit.) sour, sweet, bitter and spicy (idiom)/(fig.) all kinds of flavors; the joys and sorrows of life
dataset_meanings: sour, sweet, bitter and spicy hot
fig. the joys and sorrows of life

cedict_en: inside; interior

must_distinguish.note: All mean 'inside/interior'. 内 is a formal/written morpheme (内部, 国内); 里面 is everyday spoken (physical space); 里头 is colloquial/northern spoken.

cedict_en: surname Cuo/mistake/wrong/bad/interlocking/complex/to grind/to polish/to alternate/to stagger/to miss/to let slip/to evade/to inlay with gold or silver
dataset_meanings: to inlay with gold or silver

must_distinguish.note: 不对 = 'that's not right' (colloquial response, mild correction: 不对吧?); 错 = wrong/mistake (can be noun or adj., broader use: 你错了, 犯错).
错 = general wrong/mistake (everyday); 失误 (5k) = a slip-up or operational error (performance context — sports, work); 疏忽 (5k) = negligence, oversight (blame/duty context).
错 = general wrong/mistake (adj+noun); 不对 = predicative spoken judgment ('that's not right'); 失误 = concrete performance slip (sports/work); 疏忽 = careless lapse due to inattention

cedict_en: to grow up

must_distinguish.note: 长大 = grow up (humans reaching adulthood); 成长 = grow/mature (personal development, also broad); 生长 = grow (biological — plants, organisms); 栽培 = cultivate (plants) or mentor (people, formal)

cedict_en: the curtain falls/lower the curtain/to come to an end (of a meeting)
dataset_meanings: to come to an end (of a meeting)

must_distinguish.note: 关上 = close/shut (physical objects: door, window; also turn off); 闭幕 = close/end an event (ceremony, conference, exhibition — formal).

cedict_en: closing ceremony

must_distinguish.note: 闭幕式 = closing ceremony (specific); 开幕式 = opening ceremony (specific); 典礼 = formal solemn ceremony (graduation, state); 仪式 = ritual/rite (broader, including religious or symbolic acts)

cedict_en: enclosure/(variant of 閒|闲[xian2]) idle/unoccupied/leisure/idle

must_distinguish.note: 闲 is an adjective 'idle, free (not busy)'; 空闲 is a noun/adj for free time/spare time; 休闲 specifically means leisure, relaxation as an activity

cedict_en: variant of 鬧|闹[nao4]/noisy/cacophonous/to make noise/to disturb/to vent (feelings)/to fall ill/to have an attack (of sickness)/to go in (for some activity)/to joke

must_distinguish.note: 闹 = make noise/fuss/cause trouble (includes rowdy behavior); 吵 = quarrel or be noisy (implies conflict or grating noise); 嘈杂 = clamorous/noisy (adjective, ambient sound, no conflict).
